title: Architectural Analysis & Dependency Check
description: Perform a dependency check on the current Repository to ensure the new 'Calculated' fields don't conflict with existing reporting or UI logic.
verification_method: Manual verification of call sites and query impact analysis.

title: Database Evolution: Global KPI Splits Table
description: Create a new table `global_kpi_splits` in `db_kpi_templates.db` to store standardized distribution templates.
verification_method: Verify table existence and columns via SQLite CLI.

title: Database Evolution: Add Global Split Reference to Annual Targets
description: Add `global_split_id` to the `annual_targets` table in `db_kpi_targets.db` to link specific targets to global templates.
verification_method: Verify column addition via schema check.

title: Standardized Splits: Implement Global Split CRUD
description: Implement backend functions to Create, Read, Update, and Delete global split definitions.

title: Standardized Splits: Refactor Repartition Logic
description: Update the repartition engine to prioritize `global_split_id` values over local target settings.

title: Node Engine: Define Serialization Schema
description: Create a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) schema for KPI calculations, including nodes for Inputs, Constants, and Operators.

title: Node Engine: Visual Editor Implementation
description: Build a Tkinter-based visual canvas for dragging, dropping, and connecting nodes to define KPI formulas.
verification_method: Manual UI testing of the Node Editor Dialog.

title: Node Engine: Integration with Annual Target Evaluation
description: Update the backend calculation loop to recursively evaluate node-based formulas during target saving.

title: Smart Data Entry: Hierarchical UI Refactor
description: Refactor Target Entry UI to group KPIs by Group/Subgroup using collapsible frames.
verification_method: Manual UI check for hierarchical organization.

title: Smart Data Entry: Auto-population & Visual Feedback
description: Implement live tracing on target inputs to automatically update dependent formula-based fields.
verification_method: Manual UI check for live refresh behavior.

title: Smart Data Entry: Manual Override & Priority Logic
description: Allow manual overrides on calculated KPIs and ensure overrides are respected during batch saves.

title: Validation Layer: Circular Dependency Detection
description: Implement cycle detection to prevent infinite loops in inter-dependent KPI calculations.

title: Node Editor: Role-Based Sockets & Snapping
description: Refine node connections with labeled sockets (Numerator/Denominator) and snapping logic.
verification_method: Manual UI verification of node snapping and deletion.

title: Architecture: Standardized KPI Formulas
description: Move formula and distribution settings to the centralized KPI definition level.

title: UI: Modernized Target Entry Layout
description: Refactor Target Entry UI for side-by-side layout and implement forced manual overrides for calculated KPIs.
verification_method: Manual UI check for layout and live refresh behavior.

title: KPI Management: Hierarchical Treeview Migration
description: Replace the 3-column listbox layout with a unified Treeview and Detail Panel for clearer hierarchy management.
verification_method: Manual UI check of the Hierarchy & Specifications tab.

title: Hybrid Formula System: Node vs String Toggle
description: Implement a toggle in the KPI editor to switch between visual node editing and string-based expressions.
verification_method: Verify formula mode switch and KPI picker functionality.

title: Unified Calculation Engine: String Expression Support
description: Integrate regex-based string formula evaluation into both the UI live-refresh and backend save routines.
verification_method: Verify [ID] formulas evaluate correctly in Target Entry.
